string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: Search and filter tools — find any feature instantly
Dashboard quick-actions — Clean, Duplicates, Battery in one tap
Smoother animations — items animate in/out across all lists
Settings redesigned — cleaner sections, follow-system theme toggle
Tab bar reordered — Apps and Tools promoted for daily use
Less intrusive ads — interstitials capped at 90s, fewer triggers
